mapper.insert: INSERT INTO books (title, price, category) VALUES (#{title}, #{price}, #{category})
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, price, category FROM books WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT b.id, b.title, b.price, b.category, s.stock FROM books b LEFT JOIN stocks s ON b.id = s.book_id
SELECT b.id, b.title, b.price, b.category, s.stock FROM books b LEFT JOIN stocks s ON b.id = s.book_id WHERE b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
